projects.title: VisionX: AI Screen Intelligence 2.0
projects.bodyText:
- Next-generation neural interface for real-time screen analysis and interactive AI assistance.
- Multi-Engine Integration: Seamless switching between Gemini, Groq, Mistral, and local Ollama.
- Acoustic Neuralization: High-quality local Text-to-Speech (Silero) for AI auditory output.
- Cyberpunk UI with glassmorphism elements and intuitive control grid.

projects.title: MineBot TG — Minecraft CMS
projects.bodyText:
- Automated Telegram bot for managing Minecraft mod channels with AI-powered post generation.
- Smart Queue: Intelligent publication scheduling with configurable intervals.
- Userbot Bridge: Automated scanning and forwarding of mods from external sources.
- Auto-Watermark: Real-time branding of mod images and media.
- Web App Integration: Custom Telegram Mini App for visual management.

projects.title: Ollama Nexus: Local Intelligence Hub
projects.bodyText:
- High-tech local station for working with Large Language Models (LLM) using Ollama.
- Neural Chat Protocol: Intuitive interface for local model interaction.
- Vision Analysis: Real-time visual data analysis using multimodal models (Llava, Moondream).
- Neural Memory Engine: Persistent user preferences and context awareness.
- Glassmorphism UI with a modern dark theme and adaptive design.

projects.title: ClickUi
projects.bodyText:
- AI-assistant tool in pure Python.
- Integrates Whisper STT, Kokoro TTS, and web scraping for seamless voice and chat interactions.
- Features real-time AI response and automated task execution.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio
projects.bodyText:
- A static portfolio built with pure frontend technologies.
- Featuring dark mode support, smooth animations, and dynamic project loading.
- Fully responsive design optimized for all devices.
